rootDescription: Change the settings of the bot.
setDescription: Set a setting for the bot.
setTypeDescription: The type of channel to set.
setChannelDescription: The channel to set for the specified type.
toggleDescription: Turn on or off scraping for the specified type.
showDescription: Show the current settings of the bot.
setSuccessful: {{GREENTICK}} Successfully set the channel for {{type}} to {{channel}}.
toggleNoChannelConfigured: {{REDCROSS}} No channel is configured for {{type}}. Please set a channel first.
